sizing_rule.note: Select portfolio from unconstrained AHPR efficient frontier by solving equations 7.06a-7.06d to find E value that produces geometric optimal allocation. Specific optimal_f percentage cannot be extracted as formulas are referenced but not fully shown in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Select the portfolio along the unconstrained AHPR efficient frontier that yields the geometric optimal portfolio by solving for the value of E that satisfies the geometric optimality equations.
